title: Blumeorchis crochetii

At the genus level, Blumeorchis is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. The Orchidaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Blumeorchis belonging to the subfamily Orchidoideae. This classification highlights the unique characteristics and relationships of Blumeorchis crochetii within the plant kingdom.

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
